reason: Two jailed con-men play a tense game of wit as they each try to outsmart the other.
A widow’s final outing with her late husband’s car brings a hunter and the hunted into a chilling duel.
A housewife’s secret fantasies clash with reality in a sophisticated, dialogue-driven thriller.
A wrongfully accused surgeon uses his intellect to evade capture across Chicago.
A submarine commander and his crew maneuver a nuclear standoff in a pulse-pounding mind game.
A reporter’s probing interview with a centuries-old vampire becomes a battle of wits.
A cruise liner’s director schemes with her dinosaur partner in a deadly mind-game.
A community detective and a skeleton’s secrets ignite a cerebral clash of intellects.
Two legendary outlaws anticipate betrayal as they outwit each other in a high-stakes duel.
A special forces captain hunts a rogue colonel in the Mekong Delta in a cerebral war-of-minds.
